summary: v119 manually ports external support worker w56 direct Dbounded localization triangulated package audit in the parent worktree. The new audit file records the exact hypotheses needed to obtain IsTriangulated (Dbounded C) via Triangulated.Localization.pretriangulated and Triangulated.Localization.isTriangulated for Dbounded.localization. Product remains nonterminal because the ordinary triangulated structure on BoundedComplexCategory C, direct bounded IsCompatibleWithTriangulation, and a genuine stable infinity-category certificate remain unproved.
